content.text: Perfect! Now let me gather information about the theme context and any hooks:

Perfect! Now let me compile all the information. Here's a comprehensive overview of the Rearden web app's UI components and pages:

## REARDEN WEB APP - COMPREHENSIVE UI OVERVIEW

### Directory Structure

```
apps/web/src/
├── components/
│   ├── Button/
│   ├── CandidateCard/
│   ├── Input/
│   ├── Layout/
│   ├── Logo/
│   ├── Navbar/
│   ├── PageTransition/
│   ├── ScoreBadge/
│   ├── SearchBar/
│   ├── Select/
│   ├── SkillTag/
│   ├── VideoPlayer/
│   └── VideoUpload/
├── pages/
│   ├── Landing/
│   ├── Search/
│   ├── CandidateProfile/
│   └── Register/
├── contexts/
│   └── ThemeContext.tsx
├── hooks/
│   ├── useApi.ts
│   ├── useSearch.ts
│   └── useVideoUpload.ts
├── router.tsx
└── main.tsx
```

---

## COMPONENT FILES (All with full paths)

### Core Layout
- **C:\Users\yakik\Documents\projects\rearden\apps\web\src\components\Layout\Layout.tsx** - Main layout wrapper with AnimatePresence for page transitions
- **C:\Users\yakik\Documents\projects\rearden\apps\web\src\components\Navbar\Navbar.tsx** - Navigation bar with logo, links, and theme selector
- **C:\Users\yakik\Documents\projects\rearden\apps\web\src\components\PageTransition\PageTransition.tsx** - Page entry/exit animations

### Form & Input
- **C:\Users\yakik\Documents\projects\rearden\apps\web\src\components\Button\Button.tsx** - Polymorphic button/link component
- **C:\Users\yakik\Documents\projects\rearden\apps\web\src\components\Input\Input.tsx** - Text input with label, error, and icon support
- **C:\Users\yakik\Documents\projects\rearden\apps\web\src\components\Select\Select.tsx** - Dropdown select component
- **C:\Users\yakik\Documents\projects\rearden\apps\web\src\components\SearchBar\SearchBar.tsx** - Search input with rotating placeholders

### Candidate Display
- **C:\Users\yakik\Documents\projects\rearden\apps\web\src\components\CandidateCard\CandidateCard.tsx** - Card component showing candidate info with thumbnail, skills, and score
- **C:\Users\yakik\Documents\projects\rearden\apps\web\src\components\ScoreBadge\ScoreBadge.tsx** - Colored badge showing match score (high/medium/low)
- **C:\Users\yakik\Documents\projects\rearden\apps\web\src\components\SkillTag\SkillTag.tsx** - Skill tag with size and variant options

### Media
- **C:\Users\yakik\Documents\projects\rearden\apps\web\src\components\VideoPlayer\VideoPlayer.tsx** - HTML5 video player with play button overlay
- **C:\Users\yakik\Documents\projects\rearden\apps\web\src\components\VideoUpload\VideoUpload.tsx** - Drag-and-drop video upload with progress bar

### Branding
- **C:\Users\yakik\Documents\projects\rearden\apps\web\src\components\Logo\Logo.tsx** - Logo text component with size variants

---

## PAGE FILES (All with full paths)

### Route Structure
```
/ → Landing (hero, features, stats, CTA)
/search → Search (search bar, candidate grid with cards)
/candidate/:id → CandidateProfile (full candidate details with video)
/register → Register (form to create candidate profile with video)
```

- **C:\Users\yakik\Documents\projects\rearden\apps\web\src\pages\Landing\Landing.tsx**
  - Hero section with tagline and CTAs
  - Features grid (3 cards)
  - Stats section (500+ profiles, 85% faster, 3x match rate)
  - CTA section with Logo and button

- **C:\Users\yakik\Documents\projects\rearden\apps\web\src\pages\Search\Search.tsx**
  - Search bar with dynamic loading
  - Grid of CandidateCards with staggered animations
  - Loading skeleton states
  - Empty state with "no results" message
  - Error message display

- **C:\Users\yakik\Documents\projects\rearden\apps\web\src\pages\CandidateProfile\CandidateProfile.tsx**
  - Full-width video player
  - Candidate name, title, location
  - Meta info (experience years, availability)
  - Bio section
  - Skills section (full list of SkillTags)
  - "Contact Candidate" and "Back to Search" buttons
  - Loading/error states

- **C:\Users\yakik\Documents\projects\rearden\apps\web\src\pages\Register\Register.tsx**
  - Form grid: name, email, title, location, experience years, skills
  - Bio textarea
  - VideoUpload component
  - Submit button with loading state

---

## MOTION/REACT ANIMATION USAGE

Components using `motion/react` animations:

1. **Button.tsx** ✓
   - `motion.a` and `motion.button` with whileHover scale (1.02) and whileTap (0.98)

2. **PageTransition.tsx** ✓
   - `motion.div` with fade-in/out and Y-axis slide animations

3. **Navbar.tsx** ✓
   - `motion.div` for nav indicator with spring transition (stiffness: 380, damping: 30)
   - `layoutId="navIndicator"` for shared layout animation

4. **CandidateCard.tsx** ✓
   - `motion.div` with whileHover Y-axis lift (-4px)

5. **VideoPlayer.tsx** ✗
   - No motion animations (plain HTML video)

6. **VideoUpload.tsx** ✗
   - No motion animations (drag-and-drop UI)

7. **SearchBar.tsx** ✗
   - No motion animations (placeholder rotation via state)

8. **Landing.tsx** ✓ (Heavy animations)
   - Hero badge: scale + fade
   - H1 heading: spring animation with Y-axis
   - Subheading: fade with delay
   - CTAs: fade with delay
   - Features grid: staggered container with child variants
   - Stats section: staggered animation
   - CTA section: whileInView animation

9. **Search.tsx** ✓
   - Title: fade + Y slide
   - Subtitle: fade with delay
   - Grid: staggered container with cardVariants (scale + opacity)
   - Empty state: fade

10. **CandidateProfile.tsx** ✓
    - Video section: fade + Y slide
    - Info section: fade + Y slide with delay

11. **Register.tsx** ✓
    - Header: fade + Y slide
    - Form: fade + Y slide with delay

---

## KEY FEATURES & PATTERNS

### Styling
- SCSS Modules (`.module.scss`) for all components
- CamelCase class names only
- Responsive design with Flexbox/Grid

### Animation Strategy
- Page transitions handled by Layout wrapper with AnimatePresence
- Component-level animations for interactive elements
- Staggered animations for grids and lists
- Spring transitions for navigation indicator
- whileHover/whileTap for buttons for tactile feedback

### State Management
- React Context (ThemeProvider) for theme switching
- Local state in components (useState)
- Custom hooks for API fetching (useApi, useSearch)

### API Integration
- `apiFetch` utility function for consistent API calls
- Custom hooks: useApi (generic fetch), useSearch (debounced search), useVideoUpload (XHR with progress)
- Response type wrapping with `ApiResponse<T>` pattern

### Theme System
- 10 theme options (y2k, purple-night, rearden-metal, steel-frost, forge, neon, daylight, bliss, aurora, meadow)
- Theme stored in localStorage and applied as `data-theme` attribute
- Theme selector in Navbar

### Video Handling
- VideoPlayer: Custom controls with play button overlay
- VideoUpload: Drag-and-drop + file input with progress tracking
- Preview URL generation via `URL.createObjectURL()`

### Form Handling
- Controlled inputs with onChange handlers
- Form validation (basic - name/email required)
- Skills parsed as comma-separated list
- Video URL tracking separately from form state

---

## ROUTER CONFIGURATION (router.tsx)

```typescript
Layout (wrapper)
├── / → Landing
├── /search → Search
├── /candidate/:id → CandidateProfile
└── /register → Register
```

All routes are nested under the Layout component, which provides the Navbar and AnimatePresence wrapper.

---

## KEY DEPENDENCIES

- **React Router DOM** - Client-side routing
- **Motion v12** - Animation library (`import { motion } from "motion/react"`)
- **Custom Hooks** - useApi, useSearch, useVideoUpload, useTheme
- **@rearden/types** - Shared Candidate type definitions
